title: Open Society Foundations focus areas
summary: OSF describes its work across rights and dignity, democratic practice, and equity in governance as part of its public-interest mission.

title: Kenya civic rights starter note
summary: A Kenya-first starter note on civic rights, participation, and finding trusted public-interest guidance.

title: Kenya Bill of Rights summary
summary: Kenya's Constitution protects life, equality and freedom from discrimination, human dignity, security of the person, privacy, expression, information, religion, association, assembly, movement, political participation, and access to justice.

title: East Africa participation guide
summary: A regional guide for comparing participation pathways, governance issues, peacebuilding questions, and civic access questions.

title: Africa-wide expansion context
summary: A broad Africa-wide framing for expanding peace and civic access tools beyond the Kenya pilot.
